Abs_X44_2.0

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 740
Recv ID: 760
Baudrate: 500000
Func Addr: 01
Func Name: ABS-VDC - ABS-ESP

  {
    "minbytes": 4,
    "sentbytes": "2106",
    "name": "Read - SystemStatus",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Etat General Fonction ABS": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Etat General Fonction REF": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Etat General Fonction MSR": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 5,
    "sentbytes": "2105",
    "name": "Read - Odometer",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Odomètrie interne": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 12,
    "sentbytes": "2104",
    "name": "Read - Speeds",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Vitesse roue arrière droite": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Vitesse roue arrière gauche": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Vitesse roue avant droite": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Vitesse roue avant gauche": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Vitesse véhicule": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "sentbytes": "2103",
    "name": "Read - FillingProcessByte",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Status Remplissage": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 9,
    "sentbytes": "2102",
    "name": "Read - TachyIndex",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Développée réelle": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Développée mini": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Développée maxi": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Index tachy": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "sentbytes": "2101",
    "name": "Read - VehicleConfiguration",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Configuration Vehicule": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "14FF00",
    "name": "ClearDiagnosticInformation.All",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Sélection du groupe de défaut": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "10C0",
    "name": "Start Diagnostic Session",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Session Name": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "shiftbytescount": 3,
    "replybytes": "5700",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "17FF00",
    "name": "ReadDTC",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "MoreDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "NDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      },
      "FirstDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Historical Failure": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "Current Failure": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "Standard Fault": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "Type Of Fault": {
        "firstbyte": 5
      },
      "Specific Fault": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 3
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 22,
    "sentbytes": "1200040000",
    "name": "*ReadFreezeFrame",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "FFN": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      },
      "FirstDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Compteur de défaut": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 1
      },
      "Defaut ayant été déja réhabilité": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Vitesse roue avant droite (Freeze)": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      },
      "Vitesse roue avant gauche (Freeze)": {
        "firstbyte": 5
      },
      "Vitesse roue arrière droite (Freeze)": {
        "firstbyte": 6
      },
      "Vitesse roue arrière gauche (Freeze)": {
        "firstbyte": 7
      },
      "Tension Batterie": {
        "firstbyte": 8
      },
      "Etat MSR": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "bitoffset": 4
      },
      "Etat ABS": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "bitoffset": 3
      },
      "Etat REF": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "bitoffset": 2
      },
      "Etat de la pédale de frein": {
        "firstbyte": 9
      },
      "Odometrie Interne 1ére occurence": {
        "firstbyte": 10
      },
      "Odometrie interne Dernière occurence": {
        "firstbyte": 13
      },
      "DTC Number": {
        "firstbyte": 21
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "10A9",
    "name": "Start Manufacturer Session",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 4,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "312B01",
    "name": "Routine - PolesCounting Result",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Etat de la routine": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Nombre de dents": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "sentbytes": "30FD",
    "name": "IO Control - Unlock ECU",
    "deny_sds": []
  }
]
